name: vtsSetTriggerParams
title: vtsSetTriggerParams
syntax: long vtsSetTriggerParams (char Target[], eVTSTrigger Trigger, eVTSTriggerSourceChannel SourceChannel, eVTSTriggerEdgeType EdgeType);
description: The function configures basic parameters for triggers. Further parameters can be set with the function vtsSetTriggerParamsEx.
You can find additional information about VT System triggers on the page Triggers.

parameters.name: Target
parameters.description: Specifies which trigger is configured: Values see eVTSTrigger

parameters.name: Trigger
parameters.description: Specifies which trigger is configured (VT1004 module: 1-8)

parameters.name: SourceChannel
parameters.description: Specifies to which channel the configured trigger is connected: Values see eVTSTriggerSourceChannel

parameters.name: EdgeType
parameters.description: Values see eVTSTriggerEdgeType If a triggered is configured to level type using vtsSetTriggerParamsEx this parameter sets which level is detected.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
